title: zscalerctl config file
description: Schema for the owner-only YAML config file read by `zscalerctl --config` / `--profile`. The file must be readable only by the current user (mode 0600 on POSIX; restricted DACL on Windows). Secret values are never stored inline — only secret references (`env:`, `file:`, `keyring:`, or structured `cmd:`) belong in `*_ref` fields.

default_profile.description: Name of the profile to select when `--profile` is not given. Falls back to the name `default` when absent.

profiles.description: Map of profile name to profile data. At least one profile is required.

profile.description: Per-profile settings. All fields are optional; missing fields fall back to environment variables and built-in defaults.

auth_mode.description: Authentication mode. `oneapi` (default) uses the OAuth client-credential flow; `zia-legacy` uses ZIA username/password/API-key for read-only ZIA resources.

cloud.description: Zscaler cloud region, e.g. `PRODUCTION`. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_CLOUD`.

client_id.description: OneAPI OAuth client ID. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_CLIENT_ID`.

client_secret_ref.description: Secret reference for the OneAPI OAuth client secret. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_CLIENT_SECRET` / `ZSCALERCTL_CLIENT_SECRET_FILE`.

zpa_customer_id.description: ZPA customer ID, required for ZPA resources. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_ZPA_CUSTOMER_ID`.

zia_username.description: ZIA legacy username (used when `auth_mode` is `zia-legacy`). Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_USERNAME`.

zia_password_ref.description: Secret reference for the ZIA legacy password. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_PASSWORD` / `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_PASSWORD_FILE`.

zia_api_key_ref.description: Secret reference for the ZIA legacy API key. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_API_KEY` / `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_API_KEY_FILE`.

zia_cloud.description: ZIA cloud name for legacy auth (e.g. `zscaler`, `zscalertwo`). Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_ZIA_CLOUD`.

redaction.description: Default redaction mode for dump and list commands. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_REDACTION` or the `--redaction` flag.

no_cache.description: Disable per-session in-memory caching of API responses when `true`. Overridden by `ZSCALERCTL_NO_CACHE` or the `--no-cache` flag.

secretRef.description: A secret reference — either a string shorthand (`env:VAR`, `file:/abs/path`, `keyring:service/key`) or a structured `cmd` mapping. Secret values are never stored here; the ref is resolved at credential-read time.

oneOf.description:
Shorthand string ref. Supported forms:
- `env:VARNAME` — read from the named environment variable; fails if the variable is unset.
- `file:/absolute/path` — read from an owner-only file on a local fixed volume.
- `keyring:service/key` — read from the OS keychain (macOS Keychain, Linux Secret Service, Windows Credential Manager). Intended for interactive desktops; agents and CI should use `env:` or `file:` instead.
Structured `cmd` ref. The binary is exec'd directly — no shell, no expansion — with no inherited `ZSCALERCTL_*` environment. Stdout (trimmed of trailing newlines) is the secret.

argv.description: Argument vector. `argv[0]` is the binary (absolute path recommended; otherwise resolved via `PATH`). No shell metacharacters are interpreted.

timeout.description: Per-call timeout (Go duration string, e.g. `5s`, `30s`). Defaults to 10s if absent. The process is killed when the timeout fires.
